suppress.notes: False positive on the internal server-common module. Its artifact name collides with an unrelated "media-server" product in NVD; this repository does not embed that product.
False positive on the internal server-media-api module. Dependency-Check is matching the artifact name against an unrelated "media-server" product in NVD.

False positive on the internal server-metadata-api module. Dependency-Check is matching the artifact name against the same unrelated "media-server" product in NVD as the other internal server modules.
False positive on the internal transcode-persistence-sqlite module. The module depends on sqlite-jdbc and is validated separately; the module artifact itself is not the SQLite product matched by NVD.
False positive on com.github.java-json-tools:json-schema-validator. NVD is matching the library name to validator.nu, which is a separate HTML validation server product.
False positive on com.github.java-json-tools:json-schema-validator. NVD is also matching the generic "validator:validator" CPE, which is unrelated to this Maven artifact.

False positive on io.micrometer:micrometer-registry-prometheus. CVE-2026-42154 affects the Prometheus server remote-read endpoint, but this artifact is only the Micrometer Prometheus registry client and the jar contains registry/export classes under io.micrometer.prometheusmetrics, not the Prometheus server implementation.

False positive on the current Netty 4.1 runtime jars in this build. CVE-2026-42582 describes an HTTP/3 QpackDecoder issue before 4.2.13.Final, but the shipped jars on this classpath are limited to the current buffer/codec/http1/http2/common/handler/resolver/transport/epoll/native-unix modules and were verified not to contain io.netty.handler.codec.http3.QpackDecoder or any http3 package entries.
